Title: User login with valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter the username "testuser"
3. Enter the password "testpassword"
4. Click the login button

Title: User login with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter the username "invaliduser"
3. Enter the password "invalidpassword"
4. Click the login button
Expected Result: Login fails, and an error message is displayed

Title: Device connection
Test Steps: 1. Connect to the device with ID 1

Title: Add device to the list
Preconditions: User is logged in, device is connected
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Add Devices" button
2. Enter the device ID "2"
3. Enter the device name "Test Device"
4. Click the "Add" button
Expected Result: The device is added to the list successfully

Title: Add device with invalid data
Preconditions: User is logged in, device is connected
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Add Devices" button
2. Enter the device ID "invalid"
3. Enter the device name "Test Device"
4. Click the "Add" button
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the device is not added to the list

Title: Add device with valid data
Preconditions: User is logged in, device is connected
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Add Devices" button
2. Enter the device ID "3"
3. Enter the device name "Test Device"
4. Click the "Add" button
Expected Result: The device is added to the Agliunta Serra object successfully

Title: Add device with invalid data
Preconditions: User is logged in, device is connected
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Add Devices" button
2. Enter the device ID "invalid"
3. Enter the device name "Test Device"
4. Click the "Add" button
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the device is not added to the Agliunta Serra object
